# Xnlab Studio (XNLAB)

> Atmosphere systems for modern hospitality. XNLAB designs the atmosphere of hotels, restaurants, nightlife venues, wellness destinations, cultural hospitality and experiential formats. By appointment.

The studio operates from a single mark — XNLAB — and a single email: studio@xnlab.io. Engagements are calibrated to scope and discussed on the call. XNLAB does not publish tiers; it publishes capacity. A small number of selected engagements remain for 2026.

## What XNLAB does

XNLAB builds atmosphere systems for hospitality operators who already perform commercially and need the next layer — cultural presence, perception, memorability. The work is six systems wide: Atmosphere Systems, Cultural Presence, Experiential Identity, Digital Amplification, Hospitality Worldbuilding, Venue Perception Design.

## Who XNLAB works with

Hospitality operators across six rooms:
- Hotels & Resorts — atmosphere systems where arrival, stay and departure each carry their own gravity.
- Restaurants & Bars — rooms that set the conversation before the first dish.
- Nightlife Venues — clubs and late venues that have to hold shape across seven hours.
- Wellness Destinations — spas, retreats and wellness destinations where silence is the primary service.
- Cultural Hospitality — museum cafes, gallery dining, library bars and residency programs.
- Experiential Hospitality — pop-ups, traveling concepts and immersive formats that land in a different city next month.

## Pages

- [Home](https://xnlab.io): Atmosphere systems for modern hospitality — perception diagnostic, six rooms, signals from the lab, six systems, contact.
- [The Universe](https://xnlab.io/worlds): Six rooms of modern hospitality. Each room carries its own gravity, materials and pacing.
- [Room 01 — Hotels & Resorts](https://xnlab.io/worlds/hotels-resorts): Amber Gold. Hotels and resorts where arrival, stay and departure each have their own gravity.
- [Room 02 — Restaurants & Bars](https://xnlab.io/worlds/restaurants-bars): Midnight Indigo. Restaurants and cocktail bars where the room sets the conversation before the first dish.
- [Room 03 — Nightlife Venues](https://xnlab.io/worlds/nightlife-venues): Electric Violet. Clubs and late venues that hold shape across seven hours.
- [Room 04 — Wellness Destinations](https://xnlab.io/worlds/wellness-destinations): Ivory Pearl. Spas and retreats where silence is the primary service.
- [Room 05 — Cultural Hospitality](https://xnlab.io/worlds/cultural-hospitality): Mineral Stone Grey. Hospitality as the room next to the work.
- [Room 06 — Experiential Hospitality](https://xnlab.io/worlds/experiential-hospitality): Iridescent Cyan. Pop-ups and traveling concepts that have to land in a different city next month.
- [Atelier Studies](https://xnlab.io/studies): Internal hospitality studies — perception, direction, atmosphere, amplification.
- [Manifesto](https://xnlab.io/manifesto): Six statements on hospitality, atmosphere and restraint.
- [Lab Records](https://xnlab.io/lab-records): Editorial observations from inside the studio. Long-form reading on hospitality, atmospheric design and cultural presence.
- [Contact](https://xnlab.io/contact): Write to the studio. Short intake (name, email, studio/brand/project, the room you operate in, what you're trying to do, when you'd like to begin). studio@xnlab.io is open in parallel.
- [Colophon](https://xnlab.io/imprint): Studio details, typography credits, technical stack, brief privacy and terms notes.

## Six systems (the operating spine)

- **Atmosphere Systems** — Light, sound, material, scent and pacing, directed as one operating system across every room of the brand.
- **Cultural Presence** — The conditions that turn a venue from a transaction into a cultural reference.
- **Experiential Identity** — Identity engineered for what the guest does, not what they read.
- **Digital Amplification** — Surfaces and editorial pacing that carry the room's atmosphere into search, social and press.
- **Hospitality Worldbuilding** — Universe design across multiple venues, formats and cities, held by one creative spine.
- **Venue Perception Design** — Audit, diagnosis and re-direction for venues whose physical presence has outpaced their image.

## Engagement model

- Engagements calibrated to scope, discussed on the call.
- No published tiers; capacity is what's published.
- A small number of selected engagements remain for 2026.
- Hospitality operators only.

## Contact

- Email: studio@xnlab.io
- Availability: By appointment.
- Cities: Marbella · Madrid · Worldwide.
